name: check-ecosystem-gitignores
description: Audit .claude/.gitignore coverage across the Bodai ecosystem repos (mahavishnu, session-buddy, crackerjack, mcp-common, akosha, dhara, oneiric). Asserts that shared-content repos use selective ignores and runtime-only repos use blanket ignores. Exits 1 on any FAIL — gates the build.
author: Mahavishnu

hooks.name: check-ecosystem-gitignores
hooks.description: Walk the seven Bodai ecosystem repos, classify each .claude/ dir, and assert the right .gitignore rule is in place.
